name: sort_metrics_by_value
description: Sort metric labels and values by numeric value and return ordered labels and values.

labels.description: Labels for each metric value (for example mutants or metric names).

values.description: Numeric metric values aligned one-to-one with labels.

descending.description: Sort descending when true (default), ascending when false.

name: filter_metrics_by_percentage
description: Sort metric labels and values, then keep the top percentage and return ordered labels and values.

labels.description: Labels for each metric value (for example mutants or metric names).

values.description: Numeric metric values aligned one-to-one with labels.

percentage.description: Percentage of items to keep after sorting, in (0, 100].

descending.description: Sort descending when true (default), ascending when false.
